BAILIFF SWORN TO TAKE CHARGE OF JURY DURING DELIBERATIONS. JURY RETURNS WITH VERDICT IN FAVOR OF PLTF M. WIDNES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1114.85 AND PLTF R. WIDNES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1422.83. COURT ACCEPTS VERDICTS AND VERDICTS ARE FILED BY CLERK. JURY THANKED AND EXCUSED, ADMONISHMENT LIFTED. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PARTIES. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDG- MENT.
